mercs.name: Banshee
mercs.description: Cursing unit that can possess enemy units.

abilities.name: Curse
abilities.description: Curses a target enemy unit, causing it to have a 33% chance to miss on attacks for 30 seconds.

abilities.name: Anti-Magic Shell
abilities.description: Forms a shield around a friendly unit, blocking 300 points of spell or magic damage for 90 seconds.

abilities.name: Possession
abilities.description: Displaces the soul of an enemy, giving you permanent control of it — but kills the Banshee in the process.

mercs.name: Druid of the Claw
mercs.description: Support druid with damage aura, healing, and bear transformation.

abilities.name: Roar
abilities.description: Increases the damage of friendly nearby units by 33% for 60 seconds.

abilities.name: Rejuvenation
abilities.description: Heals a friendly unit for 500 hit points and 100 mana over 12 seconds.

abilities.name: Bear Form
abilities.description: Transforms the Druid into a bear, slowing mana regeneration but increasing damage, maximum health and armor.

mercs.name: Dryad
mercs.description: Dispeller with poison attack and innate spell resistance.

abilities.name: Abolish Magic
abilities.description: Dispels positive buffs from enemy units and negative buffs from friendly units. Deals damage to summoned units. Can be auto-cast.

abilities.name: Slow Poison
abilities.description: A poison attack that deals 4 damage per second and slows the target's movement by 50% and attack speed.

abilities.name: Resistant Skin
abilities.description: Reduces the duration of negative spells and renders the unit immune to certain spells.

mercs.name: Mud Golem
mercs.description: Tanky unit immune to spells that slows enemies.

abilities.name: Slow
abilities.description: Reduces movement by 55% and attack speed by 25% of an enemy unit for 8 seconds.

abilities.name: Spell Immunity
abilities.description: Renders this unit immune to negative spells.

mercs.name: Necromancer
mercs.description: Raises skeletons, buffs attack speed, and cripples enemies.

abilities.name: Raise Dead
abilities.description: Raises 2 skeletons from a corpse, removing it. Lasts 45 seconds.

abilities.name: Unholy Frenzy
abilities.description: Increases a unit's attack speed by 75% for 45 seconds.

abilities.name: Cripple
abilities.description: Reduces movement speed by 75%, attack speed by 50%, and damage by 50% of a target enemy unit for 10 seconds.

mercs.name: Priest
mercs.description: Healer that can dispel and buff armor and damage.

abilities.name: Heal
abilities.description: Heals a friendly unit for 50 hit points.

abilities.name: Dispel Magic
abilities.description: Removes all buffs from units within 200 area and deals 300 damage to summoned units.

abilities.name: Inner Fire
abilities.description: Increases armor by 5 and attack damage by 10% of a friendly unit for 60 seconds.

mercs.name: Raider
mercs.description: Tanky unit that immobilizes enemies with Ensnare.

abilities.name: Ensnare
abilities.description: Catches an enemy unit in a net and bounds it to the ground, immobilizing it for 4 (9 vs. air) seconds.

mercs.name: Shaman
mercs.description: Versatile support with purge, lightning shield, and bloodlust.

abilities.name: Purge
abilities.description: Removes all buffs from a target unit and slows its movement speed. Also deals 600 damage to summoned units.

abilities.name: Lightning Shield
abilities.description: Forms a shield around a unit, dealing 24 damage to nearby enemy units around the target for 60 seconds.

abilities.name: Bloodlust
abilities.description: Increases a friendly unit's attack rate by 40% and movement speed by 25% for 60 seconds.

mercs.name: Sorceress
mercs.description: Can slow, turn allies invisible, or polymorph enemies into sheep.

abilities.name: Slow
abilities.description: Reduces movement by 55% and attack speed by 25% of an enemy unit for 15 seconds.

abilities.name: Invisibility
abilities.description: Makes a unit invisible for 120 seconds. If the unit attacks or casts a spell, it will become visible.

abilities.name: Polymorph
abilities.description: Turns an enemy unit into a sheep for 2 minutes. The targeted unit retains its hit points but cannot attack.

mercs.name: Spirit Walker
mercs.description: Links units to distribute damage, dispels buffs, and can turn ethereal.

abilities.name: Spirit Link
abilities.description: Links units together in a chain. Distributes a portion of all damage dealt to linked units among the others.

abilities.name: Disenchant
abilities.description: Removes all buffs from units in a target area. Deals 400 damage to summoned units.

abilities.name: Ethereal Form
abilities.description: Turns the unit ethereal, making it immune to physical attacks but vulnerable to magic damage.

mercs.name: Witch Doctor
mercs.description: Places wards for detection, stunning, and area healing.

abilities.name: Sentry Ward
abilities.description: Places a ward that reveals enemy units. Lasts 6 minutes.

abilities.name: Stasis Trap
abilities.description: Places a ward that stuns enemy units for 4 seconds. The ward activates when enemy units approach it.

abilities.name: Healing Ward
abilities.description: Places a ward that heals 3% of the hit points of nearby friendly units per second.

mercs.name: Zeppelin
mercs.description: Flying transport that carries up to 8 friendly units.

abilities.name: Flying Air Transport
abilities.description: Loads targeted friendly land units and unloads them at a target location. Can transport up to 8 units.
